title: Introduction to Hydrology
abstract: A hands-on, animated tour through the whole hydrologic cycle — from the first flash of water vapour rising off the ocean to a full basin characterisation at your fingertips. Seven modules, each showcasing a different interactive capability of the AI-Hydro learning hub.

modules.title: The Water Cycle in Motion
modules.abstract: Trace a water molecule through all six fluxes — evaporation, transpiration, condensation, precipitation, infiltration, runoff — via a Manim animation and an interactive timeline.

modules.title: The Watershed: Where Rain Becomes Runoff
modules.abstract: Define a catchment, explore how topography routes water to an outlet, and drag a virtual rain cloud over a 3-D terrain.

modules.title: Reading a Hydrograph
modules.abstract: Anatomy of a hydrograph: baseflow, rising limb, peak, recession. Adjust sliders and run a live Python cell.

modules.title: Splitting the Flow: Baseflow Separation
modules.abstract: Run the Lyne–Hollick digital filter, drag the alpha slider to rewrite the live Python cell in real time, and interpret the Baseflow Index.

modules.title: Catching the Flow: Real Streamflow Data
modules.abstract: Pull live USGS data for a CONUS gauge, plot the annual regime, and spot a flood event in the record.

modules.title: The Shape of the Land: DEM to TWI
modules.abstract: Compute the Topographic Wetness Index from a DEM, explore the result in 3-D, and compare the elevation and wetness surfaces side by side.

modules.title: Capstone: A Basin's Water Story
modules.abstract: Choose a basin from a curated set (or enter your own USGS gauge), fetch its data, compute signatures, and narrate its hydrology end-to-end.
